title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Tricycle Pedicab Franchising and Regulatory Board (MTPFRB) Resolution No. 2020-13, Dated October 7, 2020 Entitled ?resolution Allowing All Tricycle Operators/owners with Expired Franchises to Apply for Renewal of Franchise Until October 30, 2020 in View of the Implementation of Enhanced Community Quarantine Due to Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) in the Municipality of Los Baños. (AUTHOR : HON. MARLO PJ A. ALIPON, 10/12/2020)
